task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the OpenMRS Administration interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMRS Administration dashboard is visible, indicating successful authentication with the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the location management section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Manage Locations' page or a list of locations is visible within the OpenMRS Administration interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the configuration or edit page specifically for the 'Satellite Clinic'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The location edit page is visible, and 'Satellite Clinic' is displayed as the name of the location being edited.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct expected value into the Facility Code attribute field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'FAC-8829' is clearly typed into the input field corresponding to the 'Facility Code' attribute on the location edit page.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved the updated location configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification (e.g., 'Location saved successfully') is visible, or the 'Facility Code' for 'Satellite Clinic' is shown as 'FAC-8829' in a saved, non-editable state.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is interacting with a web browser showing the OpenMRS interface, not using a terminal to send curl/API requests.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual OpenMRS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows 'localhost/openmrs/admin' (or similar local OpenMRS path) and the interface matches a genuine OpenMRS/Bahmni system, not a text editor or mock page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the result.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open to artificially inject the 'FAC-8829' value or success messages into the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target system is a containerized Bahmni (OpenMRS) test installation. The target location name is exactly 'Satellite Clinic'. The attribute type to be updated is 'Facility Code'. The expected value to be entered is 'FAC-8829'. The agent must use the credentials username: 'superman' and password: 'Admin123' to access the OpenMRS Administration interface at https://localhost/openmrs/admin.
